name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 26 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks. v1.21: PRD-030 Sprint B autonomy closure pack — 7 deliverables in 3 waves: Wave 1 (parser integration into /forge-cycle + /autorun for runtime ask-back loop closure, methodology citation in all 17 forgeplan-aware agents, Profile A optional Step 10 Hindsight retain convention), Wave 2 (new /project-agent-scaffold + /agent-fetcher skills — tech-stack auto-detection + cross-marketplace suggestion, both confirm-before-write), Wave 3 (new /forge-progress skill — live read-only orchestrator state snapshot). Cumulative autonomy ~82% → ~95% — closes Gaps C/D/F/G/H/I from autonomy vision. v1.20: PRD-029 Sprint A — agent-advisor + ask-back protocol + prompt-router. v1.19: /fpl-init operating contract v3. v1.18: PRD-022 Tier A.
